top_matching_quotes: What is actually causing the inconsistent ball striking? What's the root cause? (GGTTH)
Most golf pros can ID a Cause of a poor swing. But not that many can ID THE Cause.
the concept is great but ultimately it didn't really help me find the main causes (Harveythehacker)
quote_resonance.justification: Directly names what 85+ quotes describe as missing. Golfers ASK for diagnosis without using the word.

tier1_match.justification: Matches TIER1 golf pattern: simple reframe revealing a hidden truth. Same structural DNA as 'biggest misconception in golf.'

fssit_echo.justification: Near-perfect echo of FSSIT-02 ('You don't need more tips. You've needed a diagnosis this whole time.') The expression IS the FSSIT.

top_matching_quotes: There's an underlying movement that affects everything (Shilgy)
Every instructor saw something different
15 pro's to find one that has improved my game (hovis)
quote_resonance.justification: Golfers describe seeing multiple instructors who each find different things. The a/THE distinction names this exactly.

tier1_match.justification: Matches the 'misconception' structure — you think it's many problems, it's actually one.

fssit_echo.justification: Direct echo of FSSIT-05 ('Every instructor identified A cause. Nobody identified THE cause.')

top_matching_quotes: Civilians don't own X-ray machines (MonteScheinblum)
If you're not diagnosing the cause, you can make things worse
Tons of numbers, not a lot of info on how to fix the issues (Goober)
quote_resonance.justification: Medical/diagnostic language appears organically. Golfers already frame the gap in medical terms.

tier1_match.justification: Medical metaphor is less common in golf TIER1 swipes (those use simple reframe). Still strong but not the dominant vault pattern.

fssit_echo.justification: Strong FSSIT-02 echo through medical reframe. FSSIT-08 ('the search is over... because we start with diagnosis') is the resolution.

top_matching_quotes: the vast majority of pros out there are just lazy money grabbing con artists (leaney)
I almost wonder they purposely don't teach you too much (u/Rexkramer777)
After one full year and dumping $900 into Arccos products (Mookieb10)
quote_resonance.justification: Industry-blame quotes exist but are less prevalent than diagnosis-gap quotes. Villain is supported but not dominant.

tier1_match.justification: Golf TIER1 swipes don't use villain personification as primary. This is a health/supplement pattern applied to golf.

fssit_echo.justification: Mild echo of financial waste FSSIT. Villain framing is less resonant with FSSIT candidates than diagnosis framing.

top_matching_quotes: overwhelmed by how many things I have to remember (westozhacker)
Having a trusted person to say this is the most important thing to fix first (u/poidhxyz)
quote_resonance.justification: Golfers describe overwhelm with multiple things to fix. Combination lock addresses this but is keynote-introduced, not organic.

tier1_match.justification: The 'you don't need all the numbers, just the wrong one' follows misconception destruction pattern.

fssit_echo.justification: Mild echo — FSSIT-07 addresses knowledge overload, combo lock addresses effort overload.

top_matching_quotes: Same root cause quotes as SR-1
70% of golfers who take lessons don't improve (Clampett)
quote_resonance.justification: Shares SR-1 quote resonance but the anchor is more analytical, less personal.

tier1_match.justification: Exposes the solution model as flawed. Good pattern match.

fssit_echo.justification: Echo of FSSIT-02 through clinical lens.

candidates.anchor_phrase: You needed an X-ray, not just eyes

top_matching_quotes: Civilians don't own X-ray machines (MonteScheinblum)
AI will be vastly superior to human teachers (airjammer)
quote_resonance.justification: X-ray language is organic but less frequent than diagnosis language.

fssit_echo.justification: Echo — instructors used eyes (A cause), AI uses X-ray (THE cause).

top_matching_quotes: I got caught up chasing red numbers... came at the cost of 50-yard blocks to the right (JJFWebster)
There's an underlying movement that affects everything (Shilgy)
quote_resonance.justification: Compensation-cascade described in multiple quotes but less frequently than diagnosis gap.

tier1_match.justification: Matches ONE.1 dual problem pattern from vault.

fssit_echo.justification: Mild echo of practice paradox FSSIT.
